prompt_inputs.goal: Marathon training with high carbohydrate intake and optimized pre/post-workout nutrition timing

solution_criteria: Meal plan covers a full day with breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks
Includes high carbohydrate content appropriate for endurance athlete (6-10g per kg body weight daily)
Specifies pre-workout meal/snack and post-workout recovery nutrition with timing
Compact format suitable for quick reference
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a high-performance endurance athlete (marathon runner) requiring high carbohydrate intake and specific pre/post-workout timing

prompt_inputs.goal: muscle gain through strength training with caloric surplus

solution_criteria: Meal plan contains exactly 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day
Total daily calories create a surplus (approximately 500+ kcal above maintenance for an 85kg athlete)
Protein distributed across all meals with at least 25-30g per meal (minimum 150g total daily protein)
Includes specific food examples and portion sizes for each meal
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a strength-sport athlete (weightlifter) emphasizing protein distribution across meals and caloric surplus for muscle gain

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain performance while cutting weight for competition in 5 days with a 500 calorie daily deficit
prompt_inputs.restrictions: No dairy due to lactose intolerance

solution_criteria: Meal plan totals approximately 2000-2200 calories per day (appropriate deficit for 75kg athlete)
Includes 4-5 meals distributed throughout the day to support training energy and recovery
Contains adequate protein (minimum 150g) to preserve muscle during weight cut
Avoids all dairy products while maintaining nutritional balance
Specifies meal timing around training sessions for optimal performance
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single athlete
scenario: Testing with a sport requiring weight management (boxer or wrestler) with caloric deficit while maintaining performance and energy for training sessions
